case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. KAT M LO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY DEFENDANT GUAN, YU YI
OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-19-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED FEB-04-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JOHN
PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT GUAN, YU YI

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT YU GUAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. A SUBROGATED INSURER "HAS NO GREATER RIGHTS THAN THE INSURED." (TRAVELERS CAS. & SUR. CO. V. AMERICAN EQUITY INS. CO., (2001) 93 CAL.APP.4TH 1142, 1151.) PLAINTIFF'S INSURED HAS NO RIGHT AGAINST THE DEFENDANTS BECAUSE HER PREVIOUS LAWSUIT REGARDING THIS SAME MATTER WAS DISMISSED ON JULY 7, 2005. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA CSR # 5153. (302)
ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT GUAN, YU YI ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $463.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $463.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Continued To Sep-19-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kathryn C. Klaus, Esq., of Coddington Hicks & Danforth, Tel. 650.592.5400, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Thomas L. Libby, Esq., of Law Offices of Thomas L. Libby, Tel. 415.665.0400, specially appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT YU GUAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend. A subrogated insurer "has no greater rights than the insured." (Travelers Cas. & Sur. Co. v. American Equity Ins. Co., (2001) 93 Cal.App.4th 1142, 1151.) Plaintiff's insured has no right against the Defendants because her previous lawsuit regarding this same matter was dismissed on July 7, 2005. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera CSR # 5153

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Continued To May-08-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT YU GUAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to May 8, 2012 to give plaintiff an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of its opposition papers to department 302 no later than May 1 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288
